author: driver--design-phase-5-platform-md-460e
content: Plan: Implement vitreous_platform with 6 source files: window.rs (WindowConfig + PlatformWindow trait), text_engine.rs (TextEngine + CosmicTextEngine via cosmic-text), dialogs.rs (PlatformDialogs via rfd), clipboard.rs (PlatformClipboard via arboard), system_info.rs (PlatformInfo), event_loop.rs (DesktopRuntime + winit event loop). Dependencies: add vitreous_reactive, vitreous_widgets, vitreous_layout, vitreous_events, vitreous_style, accesskit to Cargo.toml.
